Container.Name: ChannelWatch
Container.Overview: ChannelWatch monitors Channels DVR activity and sends real-time notifications for live viewing, VOD playback, recording events, disk space, and connected clients. Configuration is handled through the web UI after the container starts.

Config.Name: config
Config.Description: Stores ChannelWatch settings, logs, and runtime data.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID used to run ChannelWatch inside the container. The Unraid default is usually 99.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID used to run ChannelWatch inside the container. The Unraid default is usually 100.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone. Change this to your local timezone, for example America/New_York.
